---
title: "R Notebook"
output: html_notebook
---

```{r}
library(brms)
library(tidyverse)
library(BayesFactor)
library(BayesianId)
```

```{r}
data("penguins")
test_data = na.omit(penguins) %>% rename(y = body_mass, x1 = flipper_len, x2 = bill_len, f1 = island, f2 = sex)
levels(test_data$f1) |> print()
nrow(test_data) |> print()
```

```{r}
test_data[10:20,]
```
```{r}
foo = BayesianId:::make_stan_data(formula = y ~ x1*x2*f1, data = test_data)
```

```{r}
names(foo)
```
```{r}
foo$N
```

```{r}
fit = breg(y ~ x1*x2, data = test_data)
```

```{r}
rstan::Rhat(fit |> as.matrix())
```
